records.content_snippet:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>

    <!-- İptal Wizard Form View -->
    <record id="sanal_pos_cancel_wizard_form" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">sanal.pos.cancel.wizard.form</field>
        <field name="model">sanal.pos.cancel.wizard</field>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <form>
                <group>
                    <group>
                        <field name="transaction_id"/>
                        <field name="amount"/>
                    </group>
                </group>
                <group>
                    <field name="reason" placeholder="İptal nedenini yazın..."/>
                </group>
                <footer>
                    <button name="action_cancel" type="object"
                            string="İptal Et" class="btn-danger"/>
                    <button string="Vazgeç" class="btn-secondary" special="cancel"/>
                </footer>
            </form>
        </field>
    </record>

    <!-- İptal Wizard Action -->
    <record id="action_sanal_pos_cancel_wizard" model="ir.actions.act_window">
        <field name="name">Sanal POS İptal</field>
        <field name="res_model">sanal.pos.cancel.wizard</field>
        <field name="view_mode">form</field>
        <field name="target">new</field>
    </record>

</odoo>
